title: P-169R Meaning of in Respect of Real Property Situated in Canada and in Respect of Tangible Personal Property that is Situated in Canada at Time the Service is Performed, for Purposes of Schedule VI, Part V, Sections 7 and 23 to the Excise Tax Act - Canada.ca
